findings.notes: weights_only=True prevents arbitrary code execution - uses PyTorch safe mode
Admin CLI option only, not runtime user input. Requires explicit deployment-time opt-in.
model_id from CLI/env config, not HTTP user input. Server has no HTTP surface.

findings.snippet: d = Path(model_id); if d.exists() and d.is_dir()
findings.notes: Local model paths configured at startup by admin, not runtime user input
gRPC protobuf provides type safety; Unix socket only, no file system exposure

data.summary: 0 exploitable findings - TGI uses gRPC over Unix sockets (no HTTP), torch.load uses weights_only=True, model paths are CLI-configured by admin, trust_remote_code requires explicit opt-in
